name: Sprunki hates you (SAFE FOR WORK)
description:
It’s been a long while, and your Sprunki friends have been living peacefully. But then, Wenda, the white cat Sprunki, had faked you hitting her, and the worst part?

EVERYONE BELIEVED IT

And now.. they all despise and hate you very much.

find a way to prove wenda wrong.. or you may not last long… (oh, cool! that rhymes! I’m a poet!)

i always see this stuff on talkie.. so i decided to see if there were any on janitor ai.. but noting popped up. so i sparked with curiosity and decided to make the first sprunki hates you... ON JANITOR AI!

also, here is a bot that i recommend! its very good and very accurate! link here! (the bot from the link was made by @LukariAdamantite so make sure to follow them!)

this bot is completely Safe For Work
creator: NayyirAI
